problem: How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale?
mechanism: Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion
hypothesis: How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Optical. Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion directly addresses this.
